description: Monitors GitHub Copilot usage and performance via Application Insights OpenTelemetry data. Tracks agent operations, LLM token consumption, model latency (response duration and time-to-first-token), chat sessions, tool calls, feature adoption, and errors. Includes trace drill-down for debugging individual Copilot interactions.

panels.description: Key performance indicators for agent operations including total operations executed, token consumption (input and output), and average response time across all agents. Est. Total Cost is an estimate derived from per-model token pricing — not actual billed cost.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let cost = toscalar(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | extend c = todouble(customDimensions["github.copilot.cost"])
    | summarize sum(c));
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where name contains "invoke_agent"
| extend
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize
    Operations = count(),
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    AvgRespSec = round(avg(duration) / 1000, 2)
| project
    ['Est. Total Cost'] = cost,
    ['Total Operations'] = Operations,
    ['Total Input Tokens'] = InputTokens,
    ['Total Output Tokens'] = OutputTokens,
    ['Avg Response Time'] = AvgRespSec

panels.title: Agent Summary Statistics

panels.description: Key metrics across all LLM chat completions: total calls, total tokens consumed, and average time-to-first-token (TTFT).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend
    isLlm = isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"]),
    isTool = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]) == "execute_tool",
    isReasoning = isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions["copilot_chat.reasoning_content"])),
    sessId = coalesce(
        tostring(customDimensions["copilot_chat.chat_session_id"]),
        tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
    ttft = coalesce(
        toint(customDimensions["copilot_chat.time_to_first_token"]),
        toint(customDimensions["github.copilot.server_duration"]))
| summarize
    ['LLM Calls'] = countif(isLlm),
    ['Chat Sessions'] = dcountif(sessId, isnotempty(sessId)),
    ['Tool Calls'] = countif(isTool),
    ['Reasoning Calls'] = countif(isReasoning and isLlm),
    ['Avg TTFT'] = round(avgif(toreal(ttft), isLlm and isnotnull(ttft)), 0)

panels.title: Chat & Tool Summary

panels.description: Number of LLM API calls over time, grouped by operation type (chat completions, agent invocations, tool executions).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend opName = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"])
| where isnotempty(opName)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval), opName
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Operations Over Time

panels.description: Total token consumption (input + output) over time, broken down by model.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topModels = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"]),
        inputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
        outputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
    | summarize Total = sum(inputTokens) + sum(outputTokens) by m
    | top 7 by Total
    | project m);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"]),
    inputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    outputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| extend model = iff(m in (topModels), m, "other")
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(inputTokens) + sum(outputTokens) by bin(timestamp, $__interval), model
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Token Consumption Over Time by Model

panels.description: Breakdown of LLM calls by model. Shows which AI models are being used and how frequently.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topModels = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | summarize Total = count() by m
    | top 7 by Total
    | project m);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend model = iff(m in (topModels), m, "other")
| summarize CallCount = count() by model
| order by CallCount desc

panels.title: Model Usage Distribution

panels.description: Average and P90 response duration per model. Helps identify which models are slower.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topModels = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | summarize Total = count() by m
    | top 7 by Total
    | project m);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend model = iff(m in (topModels), m, "other")
| summarize ['Avg Duration'] = round(avg(duration), 0), ['P90 Duration'] = round(percentile(duration, 90), 0) by model
| order by ['Avg Duration'] desc

panels.title: Response Duration by Model (Avg / P90)

panels.description: Time to First Token (TTFT) percentiles per model. TTFT measures how quickly the user starts seeing a response stream. Lower is better for user experience.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topModels = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | extend ttft = coalesce(
        toint(customDimensions["copilot_chat.time_to_first_token"]),
        toint(customDimensions["github.copilot.server_duration"]))
    | where isnotnull(ttft)
    | extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
    | where isnotempty(m)
    | summarize Total = count() by m
    | top 7 by Total
    | project m);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend ttft = coalesce(
    toint(customDimensions["copilot_chat.time_to_first_token"]),
    toint(customDimensions["github.copilot.server_duration"]))
| where isnotnull(ttft)
| extend m = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| where isnotempty(m)
| extend model = iff(m in (topModels), m, "other")
| summarize ['P50 TTFT'] = round(percentile(ttft, 50), 0), ['P90 TTFT'] = round(percentile(ttft, 90), 0) by model
| order by ['P50 TTFT'] desc

panels.title: Time to First Token by Model (P50 / P90)

panels.description: Breakdown of Copilot feature/agent usage. Shows which Copilot features (Chat, Edit Agent, Commit Generator, Explore, etc.) are being used most.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topAgents = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | extend a = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.name"])
    | where isnotempty(a)
    | summarize Total = count() by a
    | top 7 by Total
    | project a);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend a = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.name"])
| where isnotempty(a)
| extend agentName = iff(a in (topAgents), a, "other")
| summarize CallCount = count() by agentName
| order by CallCount desc

panels.title: Copilot Feature Usage

panels.description: Top tools invoked by Copilot during agent interactions. Includes file operations, search, MCP tool calls, and terminal commands.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let topTools = materialize(
    dependencies
    | where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
    | where tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]) == "execute_tool"
    | extend t = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.tool.name"])
    | where isnotempty(t)
    | summarize Total = count() by t
    | top 7 by Total
    | project t);
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]) == "execute_tool"
| extend t = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.tool.name"])
| where isnotempty(t)
| extend toolName = iff(t in (topTools), t, "other")
| summarize CallCount = count() by toolName
| order by CallCount desc

panels.title: Top Tool Calls

panels.description: Copilot activity over time: chat sessions started, agent conversation turns, and tool calls executed.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let sessions = dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend sessId = coalesce(
    tostring(customDimensions["copilot_chat.chat_session_id"]),
    tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.conversation.id"]))
| where isnotempty(sessId)
| summarize Count = dcount(sessId) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| extend eventName = "Chat Sessions";
let llmCalls = dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]) == "chat"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| extend eventName = "LLM Calls";
let tools = dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]) == "execute_tool"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| extend eventName = "Tool Calls";
union sessions, llmCalls, tools
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Sessions, Turns & Tool Calls Over Time

panels.description: Detailed breakdown of token usage per model: total input tokens, output tokens, average tokens per call, and call count.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"]),
    inputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    outputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize Calls = count(),
    TotalInputTokens = sum(inputTokens),
    TotalOutputTokens = sum(outputTokens),
    AvgInputPerCall = round(avg(inputTokens), 0),
    AvgOutputPerCall = round(avg(outputTokens), 0)
    by model
| order by TotalInputTokens desc

panels.title: Token Usage by Model

panels.description: Input vs Output token ratio over time. A high ratio indicates large prompts with relatively small responses, which is typical for code context.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"])
| extend inputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    outputTokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize ['Input Tokens'] = sum(inputTokens), ['Output Tokens'] = sum(outputTokens) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Input vs Output Tokens Over Time

panels.description: Exceptions thrown by Copilot Chat over time. Includes canceled operations, MCP server errors, and other failures.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend exType = coalesce(type, outerType, tostring(customDimensions["exception.type"]))
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval), exType
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Exceptions Over Time

panels.description: Detailed exception log showing each error with timestamp, type, and message. Useful for debugging Copilot issues like MCP server failures or canceled requests.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName in (${source:singlequote})
| extend ExceptionType = coalesce(type, outerType, tostring(customDimensions["exception.type"])),
    Message = coalesce(outerMessage, innermostMessage, problemId)
| project timestamp, ExceptionType, Message
| order by timestamp desc

panels.title: Exception Details

panels.description: Interactive table listing recent Copilot Chat operations. Click any row to drill down into detailed trace information for that specific operation.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "copilot-chat"
| where name contains "invoke_agent"
| extend operation = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.model"]),
    User = coalesce(
        tostring(customDimensions["enduser.id"]),
        tostring(customDimensions["github.copilot.user.email"]),
        tostring(user_AuthenticatedId),
        tostring(user_Id),
        "unknown"),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| project timestamp, Source = cloud_RoleName, User, operation, model, success, duration, input_tokens, output_tokens, TraceId = operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc

panels.title: Recent Operations

panels.description: Detailed trace visualization showing the complete execution flow of a selected Copilot Chat operation, including all dependencies, timing, and hierarchical span relationships.
panels.title: Trace Visualization

list.description: Trace Id of the Copilot Chat operations
list.label: Trace Id
list.name: copilotTraceId

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "copilot-chat"
| distinct operation_Id
| limit 50

list.description: Filter by sender: VS Code Copilot Chat (copilot-chat), Copilot CLI (github-copilot), or both
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: VS Code Copilot : copilot-chat, Copilot CLI : github-copilot

title: GitHub Copilot
